contents.text: Siege Bucks are the fundamental resource of Royal Siege. They are obtained throughout a match via passive generation and active depositing of Siege Coins.
Each team has a coin deposit pit in their base where stacks of coins can be turned into Siege Bucks. You can even use your opponent's pit!
Siege Bucks can be used to purchase items and upgrades from your character's shop. Shop items alter your character's playstyle and introduce additional ways to assist your team.
Siege Bucks can be transferred to teammates via dropping Siege Coins to them or by using the in-game bank.
The bank is an interface where the team's currency is kept. Teammates are free to deposit and withdraw any amount of money from it to make purchases.
